pkgmetadata.longdescription: VMWare Workstation is a virtual machine which can be used to install other operating systems in a virtual environment to run on top of Gentoo.

use.flag: Install app-emulation/vmware-modules in order to run VMs locally
Install VIX API to automate virtual machine operations
Install VMware Tools for MacOS (10.11 El Captain and later) guests
Install VMware Tools for MacOS (before 10.10 Yosemite) guests
Install VMware Tools for FreeBSD guests
Install VMware Tools for Linux guests
Install VMware Tools for Linux (glibc older than 2.5) guests
Install VMware Tools for Netware guests
Install VMware Tools for Solaris guests
Install VMware Tools for Windows (7 and later, 64-bit) guests
Install VMware Tools for Windows (7 and later, 32-bit) guests
Install VMware Tools for Windows (95/98/ME) guests
Install VMware Tools for Windows (NT4/2000/XP) guests
Install VMware Tools for Windows (Vista and Server 2008) guests
